summary: Phase 4 Admin Content Management Testing Complete. Backend: 24/24 tests passed. Frontend: All Phase 4 features verified via Playwright. Specialist categories CRUD with UUID IDs, text content management (about_text/contact_text/help_text/footer_text), CommunityPage anchor sections, and footer links all working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: about_text, contact_text, help_text, footer_text are stored in DB and editable via admin panel, but CommunityPage uses static JSX content — these text settings are NOT dynamically rendered in CommunityPage. The useContactEmail hook is dynamic but the other 4 text fields are not used in the UI at all. This may be intentional (just storing for future use) or incomplete integration.

design_issues.screen: Admin panel content tab - Text settings
issues: Text settings section doesn't auto-load when content tab is opened — users must manually click 'Načíst texty' button. fetchContent() in AdminPage.js doesn't call fetchTextSettings(). Minor UX improvement: include fetchTextSettings() in fetchContent() or on tab click.

spec_cat_get_uuid_ids.details: GET /api/admin/specialist-categories returns categories with UUID ids (e.g. 46af50c6-ab63-493f-b1ea-e90624953963). All 5 DB categories have UUID format IDs.

spec_cat_post_uuid_id.details: POST /api/admin/specialist-categories returns {id: <uuid>, name: <name>}. UUID validated with uuid.UUID() check.

spec_cat_put_update.details: PUT /api/admin/specialist-categories/{uuid_id} updates name, persists to DB. Returns 404 for nonexistent ID, 400 for empty name.

spec_cat_delete.details: DELETE /api/admin/specialist-categories/{uuid_id} removes category. Verified via GET after delete.

admin_content_tab_edit_btns.details: data-testid=edit-spec-cat-{uuid} buttons present for each specialist category. 5 edit buttons found with UUID format IDs.

spec_cat_inline_edit.details: Clicking edit-spec-cat-{id} shows inline input + save-spec-cat-{id} button. Saving shows 'Kategorie upravena' toast.

text_settings_get.details: GET /api/settings/texts returns dict with about_text, contact_text, help_text, footer_text keys. Public endpoint (no auth required).

text_settings_put.details: PUT /api/admin/settings/texts updates text by key. Returns 400 for invalid key. Requires admin auth. All 4 keys tested and persisted.

text_settings_admin_ui_section.details: 'Správa textového obsahu' section found in content tab. All 4 edit buttons present (edit-text-about_text, edit-text-contact_text, edit-text-help_text, edit-text-footer_text).

text_settings_edit_save_flow.details: Clicking 'Upravit' shows textarea (edit-text-textarea-about_text). Saving shows 'Text uložen' toast. Edit button returns after save.

text_settings_containers.details: data-testid=text-setting-{key} containers present for all 4 keys.

community_page_anchor_sections.details: CommunityPage has id='guidelines' (header), id='about' (O projektu Bloom card), id='privacy' (Ochrana soukromí card), id='contact' (Kontakt card).

footer_link_navigation.details: Clicking footer 'O projektu' navigates to /community#about. All 4 anchors accessible via direct URL.

action_items: MINOR: Consider integrating stored text settings (about_text, contact_text) into CommunityPage.js for dynamic content — currently CommunityPage uses static JSX, not the DB-stored texts.
MINOR: Include fetchTextSettings() call inside fetchContent() (or on content tab click) to auto-load text settings when tab opens — currently requires manual 'Načíst texty' button click.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminPage.js fetchContent() does not call fetchTextSettings() — text settings panel shows 'Nenastaven – klikněte Načíst texty' until manually triggered. Low impact but easy UX fix.

CommunityPage.js: about_text, contact_text, etc. stored in DB via admin but not fetched/displayed in CommunityPage. If the intent is for admin to control these page texts, a useTextSettings hook needs to be created and used in CommunityPage.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_UI_SpecCat_Phase4, TEST_UI_SpecCat_Phase4_Edited specialist categories. Reset text settings to normal values after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 admin content management fully tested and passing. Specialist categories have UUID IDs, CRUD all works. Text settings (about/contact/help/footer) stored in DB and editable via admin panel. CommunityPage has 4 anchor sections (#guidelines, #about, #privacy, #contact). Footer links correctly point to /community#about|guidelines|privacy|contact. One potential enhancement: CommunityPage doesn't use the stored text settings — they're stored but not displayed anywhere in the UI.

text_settings_not_displayed.issue: about_text, contact_text stored in DB but CommunityPage uses static JSX content
text_settings_not_displayed.fix: Create useTextSettings hook, call GET /api/settings/texts in CommunityPage, replace static text with fetched values
